name: APRM_OrderIsPaid
validation_code:
@SQL=select case when ps.outstandingamt <> 0 then 'N' else 'Y' end
          from fin_payment_scheduledetail fpsd
              join fin_payment_detail fpd on fpsd.fin_payment_detail_id=fpd.fin_payment_detail_id
              join fin_payment fp on fpd.fin_payment_id=fp.fin_payment_id
              join fin_payment_schedule ps ON ps.fin_payment_schedule_id = fpsd.fin_payment_schedule_order
              join c_order co on co.c_order_id=ps.c_order_id
                WHERE ps.c_order_id =@c_order_id@
                and to_number(aprm_seqnumberpaymentstatus(fp.status)) >= 40
                group by co.GrandTotal, ps.outstandingamt, ps.c_order_id

name: PromotionsDefined
validation_code: @SQL=select case when count(*) = 0 then 'N' else 'Y' end from m_offer where isactive='Y' and ad_client_id = @AD_Client_ID@

name: showAddPayment
validation_code:
@SQL=select case when sum(fpsd.amount)=co.GrandTotal then 'N' else 'Y' end
          from fin_payment_scheduledetail fpsd
              join fin_payment_detail fpd on fpsd.fin_payment_detail_id=fpd.fin_payment_detail_id
              join fin_payment fp on fpd.fin_payment_id=fp.fin_payment_id
              join fin_payment_schedule ps ON ps.fin_payment_schedule_id = fpsd.fin_payment_schedule_order
              join c_order co on co.c_order_id=ps.c_order_id
                WHERE ps.c_order_id =@c_order_id@
                and to_number(aprm_seqnumberpaymentstatus(fp.status)) >= 40
                group by co.GrandTotal

name: ATTRIBUTESETINSTANCIABLE
validation_code: @SQL=SELECT (CASE count(*) WHEN 0 THEN 'N' ELSE 'Y' END) from M_ATTRIBUTESET mats join M_PRODUCT mp on mats.M_AttributeSet_ID=mp.M_AttributeSet_ID WHERE mp.M_PRODUCT_ID=@M_Product_ID@ and (mats.IsLot='Y' or mats.IsSerNo='Y' or mats.IsGuaranteeDate='Y')

name: DOCBASETYPE
validation_code:
@SQL=select coalesce(max(dt.docbasetype), 'SOO') from c_order ord join c_doctype dt on (ord.c_doctypetarget_id = dt.c_doctype_id)
where ord.c_order_id = @c_order_id@

name: HASRELATEDSERVICE
validation_code: @SQL=SELECT CASE WHEN COUNT(1) = 1 THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N' END FROM DUAL WHERE EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM C_ORDERLINE_SERVICERELATION WHERE C_ORDERLINE_RELATED_ID =  @C_ORDERLINE_ID@)

name: HASSECONDUOM
validation_code: @SQL=SELECT (CASE COUNT(*) WHEN 0 THEN 0 ELSE 1 END) AS TOTAL FROM M_PRODUCT_UOM WHERE M_PRODUCT_ID=@M_Product_ID@ AND ISACTIVE='Y'

name: LINKEDTOPRODUCT
validation_code: @SQL=SELECT CASE WHEN PRODUCTTYPE = 'S' AND ISLINKEDTOPRODUCT = 'Y' THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N' END FROM M_PRODUCT WHERE M_PRODUCT_ID = @M_PRODUCT_ID@

name: Parent_AD_Org
UsesAlternate
validation_code: @SQL=SELECT CASE WHEN COUNT(C_TAX_ID)>0 THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N' END AS ISUSED FROM C_TAX WHERE C_TAX_ISMEMBER(@C_TAX_ID@, C_TAX_ID)=1 AND BASEAMOUNT IN ('TBA', 'TBATAX')

name: DOCBASETYPE
validation_code:
@SQL=select coalesce(max(dt.docbasetype), 'SOO') from c_orderline_acctdimension olacct 
                           join c_orderline ol on (olacct.c_orderline_id=ol.c_orderline_id)
                           join c_order ord on (ol.c_order_id=ord.c_order_id)
                           join c_doctype dt on (ord.c_doctypetarget_id = dt.c_doctype_id)
                          where ord.c_order_id = @c_order_id@
